name: digitentry
title: DigitEntry
description: OTP/PIN input — one cell per digit, auto-advance, paste-aware, `autocomplete="one-time-code"`.

files.content:
OTP/PIN input — one cell per digit, auto-advance, paste-aware, `autocomplete="one-time-code"`.

```jsx
<DigitEntry label="Enter the 6-digit code" onComplete={verify} />
```
